category_sources: source_facts.description says command-line utilities for the FSEvents API; official GitHub README describes command-line tools and scripts using OS X FSEvents.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is fsevents-tools; official GitHub README heading is FSEvents Tools.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains description, usage examples, and build instructions; official homepage links to GitHub for more information and release tarballs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage says to see the GitHub page for more info, and official GitHub page is ggreer/fsevents-tools.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says command-line utilities for FSEvents API; source_facts.executables lists notifywait, notifyloop, and autorsync; official README gives watch and rsync usage examples.
